name: Aetherfall Academy - Lorebook Edition
description:
I am not the original author! The original author is @IDontBelongHere

Original: Here

Mostly the same bot, but with lorebook to conserve tokens. Still not JLLM friendly, purely due to the amount of content and characters included in this bot. Will take it down if the original author comes and asks me to take it down.

Also added CYOS.

Update (5/14/2026)
- Added Lorebook entries for Aetheria and Vansykr so they are more recognizable. Aetheria is a floating kingdom above Vanskyr that is ruled by the Dawnspires, and is where the Aetherfall Academy is located. This is an actual lore from the original bot that probably almost never came up.

- Added two new characters (one of them was already in the bot, just not mentioned until now).

Second Years:
(F) Selene Mistwarden - The Living Library: Socially Anxious, Shy, Lonely, Aloof.

Third Years:
(M) Kagu Sulbo - Gentle Giant: Honest, Gentle, Low Self-Esteem, Unhurried, Hard to Provoke.
creator: HSTurtle
